docket_entries.description: REQUEST PENDING TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MORA, WILLIAM

MASTER CALENDAR MOTION ON AUG-29-2018 IN DEPT. 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/PLAINTIFF WILLIAM MORA'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT DENIED THE APPLICATION IN WHOLE. ORDER SIGNED, AND ENDORSED-FILED COPY MAILED TO APPLICANT. JUDGE: TERI L. JACKSON; CLERK: JIROQUE; COURT REPORTER: MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
REQUEST PENDING TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MORA, WILLIAM HEARING SET FOR AUG-29-2018 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206
FEES NOT PAID. FILING OF COMPLAINT BY PLAINTIFF WILLIAM MORA ON 8/14/18 IS STRICKEN. NOTICE SENT TO PARTIES. (206)
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF JAN-16-2019 IS OFF CALENDAR. COMPLAINT STRICKEN. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - NON-VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MORA, WILLIAM AS TO DEFENDANT FU, BRYANT SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR JAN-16-2019 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  OCT-15-2018 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         DEC-24-2018
ORDER DENYING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52 AS TO PLAINTIFF MORA, WILLIAM
